text_block_list.name: Santa Claus
text_block_list.text: Ho ho ho ho!

text_block_list.name: Santa Claus
text_block_list.text: A joyous day to you, Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Santa! Hello... Oh, right. It's already the holiday season.

text_block_list.name: Santa Claus
text_block_list.text: I've got a card and a present with your name on 'em.

text_block_list.name: Santa Claus
text_block_list.text: I'm off then! Have a merry one! Ho ho ho!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, thanks! I'm sure you've got a lot more work to do, but I'll be
cheering for you! Now then...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Oguri Cap,
You are formally invited to our year-end holiday party.
From your fans"

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A holiday party...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That would be so uplifting! Oh, the present... Hm, it's from the URA?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gasp! This is...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"With permission from Tracen, your fans have volunteered to prepare
a delicious feast and throw a party to help raise your racing spirits."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A feast! "We would be delighted if this event leaves you encouraged
for your next race. If possible, please attend in this signature
racewear."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh... "We look forward to seeing you." Yeah... Me too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So you're invited to a party that's being held by your fans.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hayahide... Uh, how'd you know?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh... Well, you just said so out loud.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Though you seemed to pause at the mention of your racewear. Is
something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually... the URA once told me they were making new signature
racewear for me, in honor of my achievements.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I've heard. Congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. But the design wasn't finished at all... They told me they had
the perfect idea to help after seeing me fret about it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the plan was for the fans to come up with designs. They
got quite a few made with me in mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They showed them to me, and they're really cool... I just had to ask if
they'd let me use one of the designs.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's something. So you're going to attend a fan party in racewear
that embodies their enthusiasm for you... Isn't that simply wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it really makes me happy. I mean, I'm happy, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Something's wrong with me recently. My races haven't been going as
well as I thought they would.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Even in important races, I couldn't give the people watching me what
they deserve. They believed in my ability, but I let them all down...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Still, they thought up a stunning design for me to wear on the track. It
makes me... Well, I don't know how to put it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...In other words, you're excited for the party and happy with the
racewear they made, but you're saddened... that you haven't repaid
them?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yeah. That's what I feel! But how'd you know? Just like Tama...
but no Kansai accent. Maybe it's the glasses?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Er, glasses? I-I was merely conjecturing. Anyway, your fans must have
a strong desire to cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And it's all because you appeal to them so much. The intention they
have with this party is purely to encourage you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you set racing aside for the moment and really enjoy
yourself there? I surmise that would be the best way to repay their
consideration. Well then, have a happy holiday.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you! You too, Hayahide! ...I can repay their consideration, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's a special holiday after all. I'd love to give them a
great present too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But... what would be good? This season's known for... chicken over
rice, turkey, stew, fries, simmered fish...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Salad, pasta, sautés, steamed buns, borscht... Things with difficult
names, things with fun names...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Oguri! Hey, everyone! Oguri just got here!
Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! Where am I? There's turkey, and even chicken over rice!

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: We're right in the middle of preparing for the party! But oh my gosh, Oguri! That racewear! Sniffle! It looks amazing on you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Y-you're just... so cool! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Uh... Wh-why are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: You see, everyone here had a hand in designing it! And now that you're actually here, wearing it, I just... Cry!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You designed it... To tell the truth, I was shocked when I first saw
it—to think that you felt so strongly about me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. This present that you've given me... makes me really
happy.

text_block_list.name: Child Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri. We worked really hard too! We made a big star for the tree outside! It's huge!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The tree outside... Ah, you mean the one that's even bigger than this
cabin! But I didn't see any decorations on it...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
We made it just about as large as a real star! It's taking some extra
time to bring it up the mountain, but don't worry! It'll be up before
the party starts!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wow... Thanks so much, everyone. This is all so exciting. I'm so glad.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I didn't bring anything...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if anyone will mind if I step out for a moment. I just... really
want to see the snow.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! Feel free to take a stroll until the party starts! I'm sure it'll
be fine, but do take care. The weather on these mountains tends to
be a bit blustery!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This is bad... I need to find a present for them, fast!
Hm? Say, is that...
